Upside imbalance remains - Intraday post (02/Dec)

Weekly post:

Pivotal weeks ahead - Weekly post (1-5/Dec)

Free technical review of SPX, Gold, BTC:

[free] SPX, Gold, BTC - A quick overview of the recent momentum and sentiment

I also want you to remember that I dropped an educational post about the intraday posts:

A Guide to Reading My Daily Posts

And I opened a “Guestbook” thread, where you can share your experiences, advices, testimonials regarding my substack with others…

Ok, now lets jump into the daily positioning breakdown…

INTRADAY POST Coding today’s positioning:

Overnight session held the downside pivots well. Strucutrally and volumen-wise the market has huge upside imbalances up towards 6930/40 area. Today, customers buy volatility into both direction, but more vol to the downside, hence the net speed profile is net positive, but relatively flat.

Centroid is at 6809.17 - 6818.72 area, that is quite sticky.

Upside pivot is at 6846.04With target of 6875 (pin to 6880)The upside pivot is a strong resistance. If the market ranges enough there and call skew remains bid, especially towards the tails, it can be broken, but after 2PM the probability is very low. In this case, a pin to the pivot is likely.

Downside pivot is at 6801.04with target of 6769.97 at very max,But we have a strong local support in the 6785/80 area, that can reject the spot and shoot back up to the centroid, if it is approached with hightened volatility.

OptionsDepth Heatmap
